titleStmt.title: SII 19.114: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 114. (A.R. No. 9 of 1931.) TIRUKKŌḌIKĀVAL, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, TIRUKKŌṬĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription is slightly damaged. It registers a sale of ten śey of land situated at Kaḷakkuḍi and belonging to the sabhā of Mahēndravarma-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, to the temple at Tirukkōḍikāval after making it tax-free. The sabhā gave facilities for irrigating the land by permitting the damming of the channel near the village before its conflunence with the river. This is stated to be a copy of an old document incised on a loose stone slab which, being of no further use, was destroyed.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Ituvum moru paḻaṅkalpaṭi . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 4- kāvatu vaṭakarai nāṭṭu brahmadeyam mahentrapanmaścaturvetimaṅkalattu sabhaiyom Iṉṉāṭṭu
tirukkoṭikāvil śaṇḍeśvarapperumāḷukku Immahentrapanmaścaturvetimaṅkalattu kaḷakku ṭi teṉvā sabhaiyom potunilam pattuc ceyyum ca(n)ntrātittaval Iṟaiyi
liyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttatukku kiḻpāṟkellai Ākkimutta ttan nilattukku meṟkkum Ivaṉ nilattukkey teṟkum vai saṉ nārāyaṇan tevan nilattukku meṟkkum Aiyakki Irāmatevaṉum tampiyu
m nilattukku meṟkkum Ivarkaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum kuravaca tamaṉ nilattukku me kellai coḻavatikkum pa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ākki śrīkumāraṉum kuṭiyūr periyaca
ṉmaṉum Ikkuṭi Aṭikaḷ nampa nilattukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaḷakkuṭi vāyk kālukkut teṟkkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyilum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam pattuc ceyyum Uṇṇila moḻiviṉṟi mikutikuṟai
mai yuḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟukkuṭuttom kulaikkiḻ vāykkālniṉṟum cāmantiyil mel pāṭu karaikoḷḷa kalattāl vāykkāl peṟṟu vaṭakkunokkic ceṉṟu pāyappeṟuvitākavum kaḷakkuṭi vaāykkā lāṟuṟupā
yavum nirvāravum peṟuvitākavum vāykkālkaḷ Aṭaittu vāykkālāṟey Aṭaittup pāyttap peṟuvatākavum Idravyam Aṟa koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom mahentrapanmaccaturveti- maṅkalattu sabhaiyom Itu paḻaya kalpa
ṭi In=ta śrīvimānattile Eṟa veṭṭiṉamaiyil muṉṉivājagam veṭṭikkiṭanta taṉikkallāl Ubhaiyokam Illāmaiyil Atu tavirn=tatu Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 19.114 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
